# Denoising

**Summary**: The process of removing unwanted noise or artifacts from a signal.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023]] applied denoising to the corridor stack before inversion.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023]] Essential for improving the quality of input data for inversion algorithms.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023]] Performed using CNN-based autoencoders.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Denoised predictions were significantly closer to clean results than those derived from raw noisy data. ([[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023, p. 77]])
